scenarios.name: emitter-like-schema
scenarios.title: emitter-like schema (cross-file refs)
scenarios.description:
Simulates a TypeSpec-style emitter producing many TypeScript files with
  interfaces and classes that reference each other across file boundaries.
  Mirrors the shape of real emitter output (e.g. js-cdk network package):
  JSDoc on every declaration and member, mostly-optional properties,
  string-literal union types, and nested object-literal descriptor consts.
  Exercises the binder/symbol system, refkey resolution, automatic import
  insertion, JSDoc rendering, and fragment-heavy render trees.

scenarios.name: render-long-file
scenarios.title: Render a very long file
scenarios.description: This scenario tests the rendering a long file using the Prose component, which should stress the formatter.

scenarios.name: render-many-files
scenarios.title: Render 10000 files
scenarios.description: This scenario tests the rendering of a large number of files (10,000) with no content.

scenarios.name: ts-huge-object
scenarios.title: typescript: huge object
scenarios.description: Convert a huge JSON object to TypeScript code. Stresses symbols pretty heavily.
